title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.295 - Executive head defined
text:
307.295.  Executive head defined. — The term "executive head" as used in article IX(b) of the compact shall, with reference to this state, mean the governor.
(L. 1965 p. 495 § 10) 
Penalties for violations of sections 307.020 to 307.295, exceptions, 304.570
